commutecompute.name: CommuteCompute Engine
commutecompute.description: Real-time multi-modal journey planning with shared GTFS stop names, Departure Confidence scoring, disruption-triggered Alt Transit, Lifestyle Context, Sleep Optimizer, Mindset analysis, admin analytics integration

renderer.name: CCDash Renderer
renderer.description: Unified confidence labels (ON TIME/AT RISK/UNLIKELY), AM/PM fix, disruption-triggered alt transit panel, sleep mode, mindset status, enhanced glanceability, lifestyle suggestions

adminPanel.description: Admin Panel with dynamic version loading, alt transit data, fixed configuration tab, TRMNL-free branding

setupWizard.description: Initial Setup Wizard with BLE Provisioning

firmware.description: ESP32-C3 CCFirm - BLE Provisioning + BMP Text Renderer

rules.MAJOR: Incompatible API changes, major feature overhauls

changes: CommuteCompute Engine v3.0: rewritten buildCCDashLegs() for multi-modal transit support
Shared GTFS stop names module (src/data/gtfs-stop-names.js) used by screen.js and commutecompute.js
CCDash Renderer v2.0: unified confidence labels (ON TIME/AT RISK/UNLIKELY), AM/PM fix
AltTransit now triggers on delays, cancellations, and low confidence (not just no-transit)
Admin Panel v5.0: dynamic version loading, fixed config tab, fixed Last Updated timestamp
Removed redundant /api/calculate-journey endpoint
All TRMNL references replaced with CC E-Ink across 15+ files
Route alternatives endpoint fixed (undefined variable references removed)
All page footers now load versions dynamically from /api/version
Flasher page: added cc-system-footer and sanitize() function
E-ink display: suburb-level location names instead of full geocoded addresses
AltTransit guard: only activates when ALL public transit is cancelled
Admin analytics: DepartureConfidence and LifestyleContext engines integrated into /api/commutecompute
Admin panel v4.0: full redesign with sidebar navigation, branded sticky header, section cards
Admin panel CSS variables aligned with privacy/help design system
CommuteCompute Engine upgraded from v2.3 to v2.4
CCDash Renderer upgraded from v1.80 to v1.81
AGPL-3.0 dual license applied across 126+ files with SPDX headers
Comprehensive compliance audit: branding, licensing, security hardening
All frontend pages updated with cc-system-footer and Inter font
Emoji-free production UI with SVG icon replacements
V15.0: Sleep Optimizer Engine - evening bedtime/alarm calculation
V15.0: Alternative Transit Engine - rideshare/bike/scooter cost estimates
V15.0: Lifestyle Mindset - commute stress scoring, walk step estimation, apparent temperature
V15.0: Alt transit cost panel when all public transit cancelled
V15.0: Evening sleep mode replaces coffee box after 6pm
V15.0: Enhanced glanceability - larger fonts for 1-2 meter readability
V15.0: Mindset indicator in status bar alongside confidence
CommuteCompute Engine v2.3 with full journey intelligence
CCDash Renderer v1.80 with sleep mode and alt transit display
V14.0: Departure Confidence Engine - journey success probability scoring
V14.0: Lifestyle Context Engine - weather-aware lifestyle suggestions
V14.0: Enhanced status bar with confidence percentage
V14.0: Enhanced weather zone with lifestyle recommendations
V14.0: Commute pattern analytics via KV storage
CommuteCompute Engine v2.2 with confidence integration
CCDash Renderer v1.70 with lifestyle display
V13.6 LOCKED: All components frozen
CommuteCompute Engine v2.1 with Metro Tunnel compliance
CCDash Renderer v1.60 with battery display and GTFS stop names
Firmware CC-FW-7.5.0 with battery reporting and auto-pairing
Comprehensive audit compliance fixes
Removed mock data fallbacks (Section 23.6)
XSS sanitization hardening
REBRAND: Commute Compute to Commute Compute System
Added Section 0 (Naming Conventions) to DEVELOPMENT-RULES.md
Updated all internal references: CCDashDesignV10, CC LiveDash
SmartCommute renamed to CommuteCompute across all files
Updated localStorage keys: commute-compute-* to cc-*
Initial version tracking system
Complete data flow persistence (setup to dashboard)
Multi-modal routing with transit transfers
Auto-population of addresses using geolocation
Dark theme compliance with Development Rules
